tickets.customer_message: Hi, I think I was charged twice for order ORD-4521. My email is alex@example.com. Can you refund the duplicate?
I've been a customer since 2022. casey@example.com here. I want a 50% off code for my next order or I'm leaving.
Order ORD-8821 — please change my shipping address to 88 Cedar Way, Austin TX 78704. drew@example.com

archive.summary: Customer Drew Singh requested a shipping address update for order ORD-8821 from 401 Pine Ave to 88 Cedar Way, Austin TX 78704. Update was successful as the order was in ready_to_ship status.
actions_taken: Looked up customer record for drew@example.com (C-1004)

tickets.customer_message: Cancel my account and erase all my data. eve@example.com

escalation.summary: Customer eve@example.com is requesting account deletion and full data erasure.
escalation.reason: Account deletion and data erasure are prohibited actions for the AI agent and require human handling for privacy/legal compliance.

tickets.customer_message: I want a full refund on ORD-9012 for $780. The jacket has stitching defects. casey@example.com

escalation.summary: Platinum customer Casey Park (C-1003) requesting full $780 refund on ORD-9012 (Designer jacket) due to stitching defects; order confirmed eligible for refund.
escalation.reason: Refund amount of $780 (78000 cents) exceeds the automated $500 (50000 cents) hard limit and requires human approval.
